Swarm Drone.name: Swarm Drone
Swarm Drone.description: A common form of the Buried Swarm—fast, numerous, and expendable. Swarm Drones are chitinous, insectile creatures barely larger than a man, moving with unnatural coordination and purpose. They possess no will of their own; each is a puppet-limb of the single, ancient, sleeping consciousness that dwells beneath the world. Their exoskeletons shimmer with an oily iridescence, and their movements are jerky and synchronized, as if controlled by invisible threads. They feel no fear, know no hesitation, and cannot be turned or intimidated—there is only the Swarm's hunger, only its alien imperative to devour the numina and drain the very fury-spirits from the world.

Swarm Ravager.name: Swarm Ravager
Swarm Ravager.description: A larger and deadlier elite form of the Buried Swarm, the Ravager is a monstrous predator of the insectile hive—larger than a horse, with powerful mandibles and a carapace thick as iron. Where Drones are expendable foot-soldiers, Ravagers are apex hunters, capable of tearing through fortifications and warriors alike with terrifying efficiency. Like all extensions of the Swarm, they are empty of individual consciousness; their movements are coordinated with the rest of their kind by the single ancient Will that sleeps beneath. They feel no pain, cannot be intimidated, and will pursue their objective—the consumption of numina and the draining of fury-spirits—with mechanical, implacable determination. Steel alone stands between the living and the Swarm's hunger.

Human.name: Human
Human.description: An ordinary person of the Imperium—a peregrine of only rudimentary furycraft, able to coax small hearth-and-field workings from the numina but never a fury of real power, and so left outside the Citizenry. In a fight they bleed and break as any mortal does, with no elemental resistance and no fury made flesh to shield them, relying on wit, steel, station, or numbers rather than a strong bond.

Human Terra Furycrafter.name: Human Terra Furycrafter
Human Terra Furycrafter.description: A Citizen-grade crafter whose primary bond is Terra, the fury of earth and stone—strong enough to manifest it as a hound or sentinel of living rock, with only rudimentary command of the other numina. Their flesh is lent the toughness of bedrock and the strength of the mountain; blunt force and the bite of the earth itself find little purchase.

Human Ventus Furycrafter.name: Human Ventus Furycrafter
Human Ventus Furycrafter.description: A Citizen-grade crafter whose primary bond is Ventus, the fury of wind and lightning—strong enough to manifest it and, at the height, to take true flight, with only rudimentary command of the other numina. The storm answers their blood; the lash of lightning and the buffet of the gale break against them harmlessly.

Human Ignis Furycrafter.name: Human Ignis Furycrafter
Human Ignis Furycrafter.description: A Citizen-grade crafter whose primary bond is Ignis, the fury of flame and passion—strong enough to manifest it as a serpent or hound of living fire, with only rudimentary command of the other numina. Fire neither chars nor pains them, though the quenching weight of water finds them ill-armored.

Human Aqua Furycrafter.name: Human Aqua Furycrafter
Human Aqua Furycrafter.description: A Citizen-grade crafter whose primary bond is Aqua, the fury of water, ice, and healing—strong enough to manifest it and work true healing, with only rudimentary command of the other numina. The tide and the frost are theirs, and they shrug off drowning cold alike, though lightning runs cruelly through the water in their veins.

Human Ferrum Furycrafter.name: Human Ferrum Furycrafter
Human Ferrum Furycrafter.description: A Citizen-grade crafter whose primary bond is Ferrum, the fury of metal and battle—strong enough to manifest it as a sentinel of living steel, with only rudimentary command of the other numina. Blade and bludgeon dull against their iron-warded flesh, pain is deadened, and the mind is fortified beyond the reach of fear, glamour, or domination.

Human Silva Furycrafter.name: Human Silva Furycrafter
Human Silva Furycrafter.description: A Citizen-grade crafter whose primary bond is Silva, the fury of wood and the green-dark—strong enough to manifest it as a beast of living wood and leaf, with only rudimentary command of the other numina. The forest's poisons and the bite of timber do them no harm, though dry wood burns, and so do they fear the flame.

Human Ignis-Ferrum Furycrafter.name: Human Ignis-Ferrum Furycrafter
Human Ignis-Ferrum Furycrafter.description: A strong Citizen-grade crafter of two furies—Ignis and Ferrum, fire and metal, the twin bonds of the war-houses—one wielded as primary and the other as a powerful secondary, both strong enough to manifest. They turn aside flame, blade, and bludgeon, and their warded mind cannot be cowed or commanded.

Human Terra-Ferrum Furycrafter.name: Human Terra-Ferrum Furycrafter
Human Terra-Ferrum Furycrafter.description: A strong Citizen-grade crafter of two furies—Terra and Ferrum, earth and metal, the bonds of wall and siege—a primary and a powerful secondary, both strong enough to manifest. Stone-tough and iron-warded, they shrug off crushing blows, edged steel, and the working of metal, and their mind stands proof against fear and domination.

Human Ventus-Aqua Furycrafter.name: Human Ventus-Aqua Furycrafter
Human Ventus-Aqua Furycrafter.description: A strong Citizen-grade crafter of two furies—Ventus and Aqua, wind and water, the bonds of the admirals—a primary and a powerful secondary, both strong enough to manifest (flight from the one, true healing from the other). Storm and sea are theirs; lightning, gale, drowning, and frost alike break upon them.

Human Ignis-Aqua Furycrafter.name: Human Ignis-Aqua Furycrafter
Human Ignis-Aqua Furycrafter.description: A strong Citizen-grade crafter of two opposed furies—Ignis and Aqua, flame and tide—a rare and volatile pairing held as primary and secondary, both strong enough to manifest. Neither fire nor freezing water can master them.

Human Furymaster.name: Human Furymaster
Human Furymaster.description: A crafter of the mightiest bred blood, bonded strongly to many numina at once—the rarest and most terrible of casters, commanding much or all of the wheel of the elements and manifesting them freely, several even at once. Fire, storm, stone, tide, metal, and wood all break against them, and no fear or glamour can touch a mind so guarded. Only naked steel and overwhelming force can bring such a one down.
